title: PCB Fabrication Lab
tagline: End-to-end PCB prototyping from layout milling to SMT assembly and rework.

equipment.name: LPKF PROTOMAT S103
equipment.purpose: High-precision PCB milling and drilling for rapid prototyping

equipment.name: LPKF Protoprint S
equipment.purpose: Solder paste printer for SMT assembly preparation

equipment.name: ERSA HR600/2 BGA Rework Station
equipment.purpose: BGA and fine-pitch component rework and reballing

equipment.name: Reflow Oven
equipment.purpose: SMT solder reflow for PCB assembly

equipment.name: Stereo Zoom Microscope
equipment.purpose: PCB inspection and solder joint quality assessment

equipment.name: PCB Etching Tank
equipment.purpose: Chemical etching of copper for PCB traces

equipment.name: PCB Cleaning System
equipment.purpose: Post-solder flux removal and board cleaning
